actions.script: async function fetchSearchHTML(t,e={}){const{hl:r="",gl:n="",client:s="safari",sort_by:o="",time_period:i="",device:a="",location:c=""}=e,u=new extractTitle(t){const e=/<title>(.*?)<\/title>/g;let r,n="";for(;null!==(r=e.exec(t));)n=r[1].trim();return n}function extractResultCount(t){var e=-1;const r=[/About ([\d,\.]+) results?/i,/(\d[\d,\.]*)\s+results?/i,/"resultStats"[^>]*>About ([\d,\.]+)/i,/"resultStats"[^>]*>([\d,\.]+)\s+results?/i,/id="result-stats"[^>]*>About ([\d,\.]+)/i,/id="result-stats"[^>]*>([\d,\.]+)\s+results?/i,/>([\d,\.]+)\s+results?\s+\(/i,/About ([\d,\.]+)\s+news/i];for(const n of r){const r=n.exec(t);if(r&&r[1]){e=r[1].replace(/[,\.]/g,"");break}}return e}function extractPagination(t){const e={pageLinks:[],currentPage:null,nextPageLink:null};t.querySelectorAll("td").forEach((t=>{const r=t.querySelector("a.fl"),n=t.innerText.trim();r&&n?e.pageLinks.push({page:parseInt(n),url:r.href}):!r&&n&&(e.currentPage=parseInt(n))}));const r=t.querySelector("a#pnnext");return r&&(e.nextPageLink=r.href),e}function extractNewsData(t,e="div[data-news-doc-id]"){const r=t.querySelectorAll(e),n=[];return r.forEach(((t,e)=>{const r={};r.position=e+1;const s=t.querySelector("a.WlydOe");r.link=s?.href||"N/A";const o=t.querySelector(".n0jPhd");r.title=o?.innerText.trim()||"N/A";const i=t.querySelector(".GI74Re");r.snippet=i?.innerText.trim()||"N/A";const a=t.querySelector(".MgUUmf span");r.source=a?.innerText.trim()||"N/A";try{r.domain=new URL(r.link).hostname}catch{r.domain="N/A"}const c=t.querySelector(".OSrXXb span[data-ts]"),u=c?.getAttribute("data-ts"),l=c?.textContent?.trim()||"N/A";let p="N/A",m="N/A",d="N/A";if(u){const t=new Date(1e3*parseInt(u,10));p=t.toISOString(),d=t.toISOString().split("T")[0],m=t.toISOString().split("T")[1].replace("Z","")}r.date=l,r["date-utc"]=p,r.time=m,r["date-only"]=d;const g=t.querySelector('img[src^="data:image"], img[src^="http"]');r.thumbnail=g?.src||"N/A",n.push(r)})),n}function extractTopStories(e={}){var t=e.doc||null,h=e.htmlContent||"";if(!t&&h){t=(new DOMParser).parseFromString(h,"text/html")}if(!t)return[];return Array.from(t.querySelectorAll(".m7jPZ")).map(((t,e)=>{const r=t.querySelector("a.WlydOe"),n=t.querySelector(".OSrXXb span"),s=t.querySelector(".MgUUmf > span:last-child"),o=n?.dataset?.ts;return{"#":e+1,Visible:e<3?"true":"false",Title:t.querySelector(".n0jPhd.ynAwRc")?.textContent?.trim()||"",Source:s?.textContent?.trim()||"",Date:n?.textContent?.trim()||"","UTC Date":o?new Date(1e3*parseInt(o)).toISOString():"",Link:r?.href||""}}))}async function processQuery(t,e={}){try{const r="object"==typeof t&&null!==t?t.query:t,n="object"==typeof t&&null!==t?t.query_id:void 0,s=await fetchSearchHTML(r,e),o=(new DOMParser).parseFromString(s,"text/html"),i={success:true,query:r,query_id:n,serpOptions:e,title:extractTitle(s),serp_result_count:extractResultCount(s),pagination:extractPagination(o),news_results:extractNewsData(o),top_stories:extractTopStories({doc:o})},a=Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(i).filter((([t,e])=>null!==e&&!(Array.isArray(e)&&0===e.length))));return a.news_results&&a.news_results.length>0||a.pagination&&a.pagination.pageLinks&&a.pagination.pageLinks.length>0?a:{error:true,query:t,serpOptions:e,message:"No meaningful content found"}}catch(r){return{success:false,query:t,serpOptions:e,error:r.message}}}function withTimeout(t,e,r,n){return Promise.race([t,new Promise((t=>setTimeout((()=>t({query:r,serpOptions:n,timeout:true,error:"Request timed out after "+e+"ms"})),e)))])}async function fetchNewsWithConfig(t,r={}){const n=t.map((t=>processQuery(t,r)));try{return await Promise.all(n)}catch(e){return console.error("Error in fetchNewsWithConfig:",e),t.map((t=>({query:t,serpOptions:r,error:e.message})))}} var serpOpts={hl:'${hl}',gl:'${gl}',sort_by:'${sort_by}',time_period:'${time_period}',device:'${device}',location:'${location}'}; var queryList='${queries}'.split(',').map(function(q){return q.trim();}); var results=await fetchNewsWithConfig(queryList,serpOpts); return JSON.stringify({search_type:'google-news',total_queries:queryList.length,results:results});
